items.title: Vrabel to seek counseling, miss Day 3 of draft
items.summary: Patriots coach Mike Vrabel won't be with the team for the third day of the NFL draft Saturday, as he plans to be with his family outside of Massachusetts.

items.title: Bettors split on Bailey, Reese as No. 2 overall pick
items.summary: The betting market has been set on Fernando Mendoza going first in Thursday's NFL draft for months. But who will be the second pick, a selection owned by the Jets, is a different story. The odds on the second pick have moved dramatically in recent weeks.

items.title: Sources: NFL prospect Banks eyes June clearance
items.summary: Florida's Caleb Banks, one of the top defensive tackles in this year's draft, is expected to be fully cleared for football activities in early June after offseason foot surgery, sources told ESPN.
